title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Built large-scale web crawlers and ETL pipelines with Python and event-driven backend systems.
highlights: Developed dozens of Python web crawlers and ETL pipelines to process large datasets into PostgreSQL.
Implemented event-driven architecture with Django, Flask, RabbitMQ, and Scrapy for resilient extraction and scheduling.
Deployed Elasticsearch for fast search across large datasets.
manual_highlights: Worked in Linux environments while building and operating Python-based data extraction and ETL systems.
Implemented tens of Python web crawlers with the Scrapy framework to extract critical company data from public websites.
Architected a system to manage and control web crawlers, centralizing execution control and operational monitoring in a single UI.
Built crawler orchestration and monitoring capabilities using Django, FastAPI, and RabbitMQ.
Improved control and accountability of company web-crawling operations through centralized management and visibility.
Implemented ETL pipelines to collect, transform, and store data from multiple sources.
Designed and maintained PostgreSQL databases supporting large-scale data collection workloads.
Implemented database clustering and partitioning strategies to improve fault tolerance and performance.

manual_notes.note: User confirmed Linux experience at First Due.
Implemented tens of web crawlers in Python using the Scrapy framework to scrape critical data for the company from public websites.

Architected a system to manage and control web crawlers, centralizing crawler execution and monitoring into a single UI using Django, FastAPI, and RabbitMQ, improving control and accountability of web-crawling activity.

Implemented ETL pipelines to collect, transform, and store data from different sources; designed and maintained PostgreSQL databases; and implemented database clustering and partitioning for fault tolerance and performance improvement.

source.notes: Parsed from JOSE BANDE SERRANO RESUME V6.pdf
